topic.title: Attendance Requirements Reminder
topic.text:
To be marked present for a class session, students must complete all of the following:

  1. Attend the entire class session, including the speaker series and the lecture

  2. Remain present for the full duration of class

  3. Complete the attendance quiz for that session

Failure to complete any one of the above components will result in the student being marked absent for that class.

Please note that technical issues (internet connectivity, device problems, platform access issues, etc.) do NOT constitute an excused absence. Since this course meets once per week, students are expected to plan ahead and ensure their setup is reliable for the scheduled class time.

Repeated technical difficulties will not be accepted as justification for missing required attendance components going forward.
